Environmental Protection.summary: Opposes expansive federal environmental regulations and supports energy independence through traditional energy sources.
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act climate provisions (Senate vote, August 2023 - as Governor publicly opposed)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Supports tax cuts and opposes progressive tax increases.

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Supports restrictions on abortion access and signed abortion restrictions as Governor.
voted_for: 12-week abortion ban as Nebraska Governor (Signed LB 574, May 2023)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Signed legislation restricting gender-affirming care and opposed LGBTQ+ protections as Governor.
voted_for: Ban on gender-affirming care for minors as Nebraska Governor (Signed LB 574, May 2023)
